bride.name: M. Roohiya Muffasareen
bride.dua: May Allah bless this union with endless barakah and fill their home with peace and love.

groom.name: S. Abdul Munaaf
groom.dua: We pray that Allah makes this marriage a source of mercy, tranquility, and joy for both families.

nikah.venueAddress: Prabhath Nagar, V.V Nagar, Guntakal, Andhra Pradesh 515801
nikah.dressCode: Traditional & Modest — Sherwani, Kurta for Men | Abaya, Hijab, Anarkali for Women
nikah.note: The sacred marriage contract ceremony. Please arrive 15 minutes early.
nikah.prayerNote: Nikah is scheduled between Asr and Maghrib prayers.

walima.venueAddress: Prabhath Nagar, V.V Nagar, Guntakal, Andhra Pradesh 515801
walima.dressCode: Festive & Formal — Suits, Sherwani for Men | Lehenga, Saree, Gown for Women
walima.note: The reception feast hosted by the groom's family, following the Sunnah of Prophet Muhammad ﷺ

nearestMasjid: Guntakal Railway Colony Masjid — near the venue

faq.question: Is there a prayer area at the venue?
faq.answer: Yes, the Railway Institute has a designated prayer area. Nearby masjids are also accessible within walking distance.

faq.question: Will there be separate seating for men and women?
faq.answer: Yes, separate seating arrangements have been made at both events to maintain Islamic traditions.

faq.question: Is parking available?
faq.answer: Yes, the Railway Institute offers ample free parking space for all guests.

faq.question: Are children welcome?
faq.answer: Absolutely! Children are welcome at both events. A kids' area will be set up at the Walima.

faq.question: What's the dress code difference between Nikah and Walima?
faq.answer: Nikah: Traditional and modest attire (kurta/sherwani for men, abaya/hijab for women). Walima: Festive formal — you may dress up more while maintaining modesty.

faq.question: Can I attend only one event?
faq.answer: Of course! You're welcome to attend either or both. Please indicate your preference in the RSVP.

faq.question: How do I reach Guntakal?
faq.answer: Guntakal is a major railway junction in Andhra Pradesh. It is well connected by train from Hyderabad, Bangalore, and Chennai. The Railway Institute is located near the railway station.
